results.check_summary: Bounded alternating subsequences suggest a phase-periodic modular rule; continuation uncertain.
No unique simple low-order recurrence identified from the bounded prefix.
Subsequence differences do not stabilize under a simple interleave.
Block deltas show positive boundary jumps followed by increasingly long constant negative runs.
results.rule_summary: GROWBLOCK with polynomial boundary jumps and phase-specific steps.

results.check_summary: Bounded interleaved streams remain underdetermined from the prefix.

results.check_summary: Large alternating excursions suggest a phase-dependent second-order or affine rule; continuation uncertain.
